nodes.name: Get Sheet Rows
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID with the real sheet ID from its URL. Columns A-H must match docs/GOOGLE_SHEET_SCHEMA.md exactly.

nodes.name: Parse & Filter New/Retry Rows
nodes.notes: Column order (A-H): website_url, client_email, client_name, status, repo_name, live_url, error_message, processed_at. Row 1 is the header, so data starts at row 2.
